en: Now King David was old and advanced in years. And although they covered him with clothes, he could not get warm.
zh: 大衛王老了，年事已高，他們雖用許多衣服蓋著他，他仍不感到暖和。

en: Therefore his servants said to him, "Let a young woman be sought for my lord the king, and let her wait on the king and be in his service. Let her lie in your arms, that my lord the king may be warm."
zh: 所以他的臣僕對他說：“不如為我主我王尋找一個年輕的處女，使她侍候在王面前，照顧王，睡在王的懷中，好使我主我王得到暖和。”

en: So they sought for a beautiful young woman throughout all the territory of Israel, and found Abishag the Shunammite, and brought her to the king.
zh: 於是他們在以色列全境尋找一個美貌的少女，結果找著了一個書念的女子亞比煞，就把她帶到王面前。

en: The young woman was very beautiful, and she was of service to the king and attended to him, but the king knew her not.
zh: 這少女極其美麗。她照顧王，服事他，可是王沒有與她發生過關係。

en: Now Adonijah the son of Haggith exalted himself, saying, "I will be king." And he prepared for himself chariots and horsemen, and fifty men to run before him.
zh: 那時哈及的兒子亞多尼雅妄自尊大，說：“我必作王。”就為自己預備了戰車、騎兵，又有五十人在他前面奔走。

en: His father had never at any time displeased him by asking, "Why have you done thus and so?" He was also a very handsome man, and he was born next after Absalom.
zh: 他的父親從來沒有責難他說：“你為甚麼這樣作呢？”他的容貌也很英俊，他是在押沙龍之後生的。

en: He conferred with Joab the son of Zeruiah and with Abiathar the priest. And they followed Adonijah and helped him.
zh: 亞多尼雅與洗魯雅的兒子約押和亞比亞他祭司商議以後，二人都答應支持他。

en: But Zadok the priest and Benaiah the son of Jehoiada and Nathan the prophet and Shimei and Rei and David's mighty men were not with Adonijah.
zh: 但撒督祭司、耶何耶大的兒子比拿雅，拿單先知、示每、利以和大衛的勇士都不擁護亞多尼雅。

en: Adonijah sacrificed sheep, oxen, and fattened cattle by the Serpent's Stone, which is beside En-rogel, and he invited all his brothers, the king's sons, and all the royal officials of Judah,
zh: 有一天，亞多尼雅在隱．羅結旁邊，瑣希列的磐石那裡，宰殺牛羊和肥畜，邀請他所有的兄弟，就是王的眾子和所有作王的臣僕的猶大人，來參加筵席。

en: but he did not invite Nathan the prophet or Benaiah or the mighty men or Solomon his brother.
zh: 只是沒有邀請拿單先知、比拿雅、眾勇士和他的兄弟所羅門。

en: Then Nathan said to Bathsheba the mother of Solomon, "Have you not heard that Adonijah the son of Haggith has become king and David our lord does not know it?
zh: 拿單對所羅門的母親拔示巴說：“哈及的兒子亞多尼雅作了王，而我們的主大衛還不知道，你難道沒有聽見嗎？

en: Now therefore come, let me give you advice, that you may save your own life and the life of your son Solomon.
zh: 現在你來，我可以給你出一個主意，好救你的性命和你兒子所羅門的性命。

en: Go in at once to King David, and say to him, 'Did you not, my lord the king, swear to your servant, saying, "Solomon your son shall reign after me, and he shall sit on my throne"? Why then is Adonijah king?'
zh: 你進去見大衛王，對他說：‘我主我王，你不是曾經向婢女起誓，說：“你的兒子所羅門必接續我作王，他要坐在我的王位上”嗎？現在為甚麼亞多尼雅作了王呢？’

en: Then while you are still speaking with the king, I also will come in after you and confirm your words."
zh: 你還在那裡與王說話的時候，我會隨後進來，證實你的話。”

en: So Bathsheba went to the king in his chamber (now the king was very old, and Abishag the Shunammite was attending to the king).
zh: 於是拔示巴進到內室去見王。王很老了，書念的女子亞比煞正在服事王。

en: Bathsheba bowed and paid homage to the king, and the king said, "What do you desire?"
zh: 拔示巴向王俯伏叩拜，王問：“你要甚麼？”

en: She said to him, "My lord, you swore to your servant by the LORD your God, saying, 'Solomon your son shall reign after me, and he shall sit on my throne.'
zh: 她回答說：“我主啊，你曾經指著耶和華你的 神向婢女起誓，說：‘你的兒子所羅門必接續我作王，他要坐在我的王位上’，

en: And now, behold, Adonijah is king, although you, my lord the king, do not know it.
zh: 可是，現在亞多尼雅作了王了；而我主我王，你還不知道。

en: He has sacrificed oxen, fattened cattle, and sheep in abundance, and has invited all the sons of the king, Abiathar the priest, and Joab the commander of the army, but Solomon your servant he has not invited.
zh: 他宰殺了許多公牛、肥畜和羊，邀請了王所有的兒子、亞比亞他祭司和軍隊的元帥約押，卻沒有邀請王的僕人所羅門。

en: And now, my lord the king, the eyes of all Israel are on you, to tell them who shall sit on the throne of my lord the king after him.
zh: 我主我王啊，現在以色列眾人的眼睛都看著你，等你告訴他們誰要坐在我主我王的王位上，接續你作王。

en: Otherwise it will come to pass, when my lord the king sleeps with his fathers, that I and my son Solomon will be counted offenders."
zh: 否則，到我主我王與列祖同睡之後，我和我的兒子所羅門就要被算為罪人了。”

en: While she was still speaking with the king, Nathan the prophet came in.
zh: 拔示巴還在與王說話的時候，拿單先知就進來了。

en: And they told the king, "Here is Nathan the prophet." And when he came in before the king, he bowed before the king, with his face to the ground.
zh: 有人告訴王說：“拿單先知來了。”拿單來到王面前，向王叩拜。

en: And Nathan said, "My lord the king, have you said, 'Adonijah shall reign after me, and he shall sit on my throne'?
zh: 拿單說：“我主我王啊，你曾說過：‘亞多尼雅要接續我作王，坐在我的王位上’嗎？

en: For he has gone down this day and has sacrificed oxen, fattened cattle, and sheep in abundance, and has invited all the king's sons, the commanders of the army, and Abiathar the priest. And behold, they are eating and drinking before him, and saying, 'Long live King Adonijah!'
zh: 今天他下去宰殺了許多公牛、肥畜和羊，又請了王所有的兒子、眾軍長和亞比亞他祭司。他們正在亞多尼雅面前又吃又喝，說：‘亞多尼雅王萬歲。’

en: But me, your servant, and Zadok the priest, and Benaiah the son of Jehoiada, and your servant Solomon he has not invited.
zh: 只有我，就是你的僕人，撒督祭司、耶何耶大的兒子比拿雅和你的僕人所羅門，他都沒有邀請。

en: Has this thing been brought about by my lord the king and you have not told your servants who should sit on the throne of my lord the king after him?"
zh: 我主我王是不是作了這事，而你沒有告訴你的眾臣僕，誰要接續我主我王，坐你的王位呢？”

en: Then King David answered, "Call Bathsheba to me." So she came into the king's presence and stood before the king.
zh: 大衛回答說：“召拔示巴到我這裡來。”於是拔示巴來到王面前，站在那裡。

en: And the king swore, saying, "As the LORD lives, who has redeemed my soul out of every adversity,
zh: 王就起誓說：“我指著曾經救我的性命脫離一切患難的永活的耶和華起誓，

en: as I swore to you by the LORD, the God of Israel, saying, 'Solomon your son shall reign after me, and he shall sit on my throne in my place,' even so will I do this day."
zh: 我從前怎樣指著耶和華以色列的 神向你起誓，說：‘你的兒子所羅門必接續我作王，要坐在我的王位上’，我今天也必照樣行。”

en: Then Bathsheba bowed with her face to the ground and paid homage to the king and said, "May my lord King David live forever!"
zh: 於是拔示巴面伏在地，向王叩拜，說：“願我主大衛王萬歲！”

en: King David said, "Call to me Zadok the priest, Nathan the prophet, and Benaiah the son of Jehoiada." So they came before the king.
zh: 大衛王又說：“召撒督祭司、拿單先知和耶何耶大的兒子比拿雅到我這裡來。”他們都來到王面前。

en: And the king said to them, "Take with you the servants of your lord and have Solomon my son ride on my own mule, and bring him down to Gihon.
zh: 王就對他們說：“你們要帶著你們主人的僕人，使我的兒子所羅門騎上我的騾子，送他下到基訓去。

en: And let Zadok the priest and Nathan the prophet there anoint him king over Israel. Then blow the trumpet and say, 'Long live King Solomon!'
zh: 在那裡撒督祭司和拿單先知要膏立他作以色列的王。你們要吹角，說：‘所羅門王萬歲！’

en: You shall then come up after him, and he shall come and sit on my throne, for he shall be king in my place. And I have appointed him to be ruler over Israel and over Judah."
zh: 然後你們要跟隨他上來；他要來坐在我的王位上；他要接續我作王。我已經立了他作以色列和猶大的統治者。”

en: And Benaiah the son of Jehoiada answered the king, "Amen! May the LORD, the God of my lord the king, say so.
zh: 耶何耶大的兒子比拿雅回答王說：“阿們！願耶和華我主我王的 神也是這樣說。

en: As the LORD has been with my lord the king, even so may he be with Solomon, and make his throne greater than the throne of my lord King David."
zh: 耶和華怎樣與我主我王同在，願他也照樣與所羅門同在，使他的王位，比我主大衛王的王位更偉大。”

en: So Zadok the priest, Nathan the prophet, and Benaiah the son of Jehoiada, and the Cherethites and the Pelethites went down and had Solomon ride on King David's mule and brought him to Gihon.
zh: 於是撒督祭司、拿單先知和耶何耶大的兒子比拿雅，以及基利提人和比利提人都下去，使所羅門騎上大衛王的騾子，送他到基訓去。

en: There Zadok the priest took the horn of oil from the tent and anointed Solomon. Then they blew the trumpet, and all the people said, "Long live King Solomon!"
zh: 撒督祭司從帳幕裡拿出那盛膏油的角，膏立所羅門；然後有人吹角，眾民就說：“所羅門王萬歲！”

en: And all the people went up after him, playing on pipes, and rejoicing with great joy, so that the earth was split by their noise.
zh: 眾民都跟隨他上去，吹著笛子，十分歡樂，以致大地也因他們的聲音震裂。

en: Adonijah and all the guests who were with him heard it as they finished feasting. And when Joab heard the sound of the trumpet, he said, "What does this uproar in the city mean?"
zh: 亞多尼雅和所有與他在一起的賓客剛剛吃完了飯，聽到這聲音；約押聽到角聲，就說：“城裡為甚麼有這樣喧嚷的聲音呢？”

en: While he was still speaking, behold, Jonathan the son of Abiathar the priest came. And Adonijah said, "Come in, for you are a worthy man and bring good news."
zh: 他還在說話的時候，亞比亞他祭司的兒子約拿單來了。亞多尼雅對他說：“進來吧！你是個忠義的人，一定帶來了好消息。”

en: Jonathan answered Adonijah, "No, for our lord King David has made Solomon king,
zh: 約拿單對亞多尼雅說：“不好了，我們的主大衛王已經立了所羅門為王了。

en: and the king has sent with him Zadok the priest, Nathan the prophet, and Benaiah the son of Jehoiada, and the Cherethites and the Pelethites. And they had him ride on the king's mule.
zh: 王差派撒督祭司、拿單先知和耶何耶大的兒子比拿雅，以及基利提人和比利提人，與所羅門同去。他們使所羅門騎上王的騾子。

en: And Zadok the priest and Nathan the prophet have anointed him king at Gihon, and they have gone up from there rejoicing, so that the city is in an uproar. This is the noise that you have heard.
zh: 撒督祭司和拿單先知已經在基訓膏立他作王。眾人都從那裡歡歡喜喜上路；你們聽見的聲音，就是城裡的喧鬧聲。

en: Solomon sits on the royal throne.
zh: 不但所羅門已經坐在這王國的王位上，

en: Moreover, the king's servants came to congratulate our lord King David, saying, 'May your God make the name of Solomon more famous than yours, and make his throne greater than your throne.' And the king bowed himself on the bed.
zh: 而且王的臣僕也來為我們的主大衛王祝福說：‘願你的 神使所羅門的名聲比你的更尊榮，使他的王位比你的更偉大。’王就在床上屈身下拜。

en: And the king also said, 'Blessed be the LORD, the God of Israel, who has granted someone to sit on my throne this day, my own eyes seeing it.'"
zh: 王又這樣說：‘耶和華以色列的 神是應當稱頌的，因為他今天賜了一人坐在我的王位上，也使我親眼看見這事。’”

en: Then all the guests of Adonijah trembled and rose, and each went his own way.
zh: 亞多尼雅所有的賓客都懼怕，大家起身，各自逃走了。

en: And Adonijah feared Solomon. So he arose and went and took hold of the horns of the altar.
zh: 亞多尼雅懼怕所羅門，就起來，去抓緊祭壇的角。

en: Then it was told Solomon, "Behold, Adonijah fears King Solomon, for behold, he has laid hold of the horns of the altar, saying, 'Let King Solomon swear to me first that he will not put his servant to death with the sword.'"
zh: 有人告訴所羅門說：“亞多尼雅懼怕所羅門王。他現在抓緊祭壇的角說：‘願所羅門王今天向我起誓，決不會用刀殺死他的僕人。’”

en: And Solomon said, "If he will show himself a worthy man, not one of his hairs shall fall to the earth, but if wickedness is found in him, he shall die."
zh: 所羅門說：“他若是作一個忠義的人，他的頭髮連一根也不會掉在地上；但在他身上若是發現有甚麼惡行，他必定死。”

en: So King Solomon sent, and they brought him down from the altar. And he came and paid homage to King Solomon, and Solomon said to him, "Go to your house."
zh: 於是所羅門派人去把亞多尼雅從祭壇上帶下來。他來向所羅門叩拜；所羅門對他說：“回你的家去吧！”
